title: A Developer Simulation of Building the Site
description: Simulate a developer asking Codex to build the site through MCP.

render.markdown:
# A Developer Simulation of Building the Site

The demo flow for this project was:

1. initialize the project with `anydocs init --agent codex`
2. call `project_open` and `project_validate` from an MCP client
3. update the welcome page with `page_update`
4. create Codex-focused pages with `page_create`
5. verify the result with `page_list`

The current MCP v1 slice does not include navigation mutation yet, so navigation authoring is still deferred to a later MCP slice or manual editing.
